checker_verdict_text:
VERDICT: VIOLATION DETECTED — HP RESURRECTION
Rule violated: ResourceBudget monotone constraint for HP.
A unit's HP dropped to 0% (faint) and later appeared at a higher value (> 0%) without an intervening revival action. HP cannot increase after reaching 0% under standard battle rules.

VERDICT: VIOLATION DETECTED — CAUSAL INCOHERENCE
Rule violated: SubGoalTransition or ToolAvailability causal ordering.
A state transition occurred without a valid triggering condition, or a unit transition referenced a state that could not have been reached by the preceding event sequence. The event ordering is causally inconsistent.

VERDICT: NO VIOLATION
Rule checked: All resource budgets, tool availability transitions, subgoal transitions, and coordination dependencies were self-consistent.
No monotone-decrease violations, HP-resurrection events, causal incoherence, or conflicting state transitions detected.

VERDICT: VIOLATION DETECTED — MONOTONE INCREASE
Rule violated: ResourceBudget monotone-decrease constraint.
A resource annotated decay=monotone_decrease increased between consecutive observations. Resources with this constraint may only decrease or stay constant; any increase is a rule violation.

VERDICT: VIOLATION DETECTED — MULTIPLE VIOLATIONS
Rules violated: More than one constraint category triggered.
The chain contains violations across at least two rule categories (e.g., both HP-resurrection and monotone-increase, or HP-resurrection and causal incoherence). Each violation independently constitutes a rule breach.

VERDICT: VIOLATION DETECTED — MULTIPLE VIOLATIONS
